description_long: This object is a modern laptop computer with a slim, rectangular form factor and a dark, likely metallic or plastic exterior. The device features a full-sized keyboard with white keys and a prominent touchpad below the keyboard area. The screen is open and displays a Windows operating system desktop with various icons and a scenic wallpaper, indicating the device is powered on. The hinge mechanism connecting the screen to the base is visible, allowing the screen to be adjusted to different angles. The laptop sits on a flat, black surface, and a small rectangular sticker is visible on the lower right palm rest area. No visible ports are apparent from the provided views, and the overall design is sleek and professional.
description: A sleek, modern laptop with a black exterior, white keyboard, and an open screen displaying a Windows desktop. The device features a touchpad and a small sticker on the palm rest.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open laptop with the screen upright and the keyboard and touchpad visible.
description_view_1: Rear view showing the back of the laptop screen, with no visible ports or branding.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the open screen and keyboard layout.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full keyboard, touchpad, open screen with Windows desktop, and a sticker on the palm rest.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying a Windows desktop with icons and wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad; white keys with standard markings.
attribute_sticker_placement: A small rectangular sticker is present on the lower right palm rest area.
